summary: Completed comprehensive testing of Pangolin BEYOND laser control app. All backend APIs working correctly after fixing MongoDB ObjectId serialization issue. Frontend UI fully functional with all 20 cue buttons, settings dialog, master controls, and command logs working as expected.

fixed_bugs.issue: MongoDB ObjectId serialization error causing 500 Internal Server Error
fixed_bugs.fix_applied: Modified response to exclude MongoDB ObjectId fields

minor_warnings.issue: Missing Description or aria-describedby for DialogContent accessibility

passed_tests: Backend API root endpoint (/api/)
Backend API status endpoint (/api/status)
Backend API get config endpoint (/api/config GET)
Backend API save config endpoint (/api/config POST)
Backend API connect endpoint (/api/connect) - properly returns 503 for invalid connection
Backend API disconnect endpoint (/api/disconnect)
Backend API start cue endpoint (/api/cue/start)
Backend API stop all endpoint (/api/stop-all)
Backend API blackout on/off endpoints (/api/blackout/on, /api/blackout/off)
Backend API logs endpoint (/api/logs)
Backend API clear logs endpoint (/api/logs DELETE)
Frontend app loads correctly with proper title
Frontend connection status indicator displays correctly
Frontend 20 cue buttons are all present and clickable
Frontend settings dialog opens with host/port/timeout inputs
Frontend settings form accepts input and closes properly
Frontend STOP ALL button is clickable and functional
Frontend BLACKOUT button is clickable and functional
Frontend command logs area displays correctly
Frontend clear logs button is functional
Frontend shows no error messages
